Let $G$ be the set of all continuous functions $f : \mathbb{R} \to \mathbb{R}$,
satisfying the following properties:

\begin{enumerate}[(a)]
\item $f(x) = f(x + 1)$ for all $x$,
\item $\displaystyle{\int_{0}^{1} f(x) dx = 1999}$.
\end{enumerate}
Show that there is a number $\alpha$ such that $\alpha =
\displaystyle{\int_{0}^{1} \int_{0}^{x} f(x + y) dy dx}$ for all $f \in G$.
